response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains and technologies, with notable open-source contributions and architectural fluency, but lacks explicit AI product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or demonstrable AI-driven innovation at scale required for this principal engineer role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and systems engineering experience across 15+ years
Strong open-source contributions and tooling innovation (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and educate teams through workshops
concerns: No clear evidence of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms
Limited visibility into cloud-native AI strategy or enterprise AI adoption experience
No formal leadership or strategic advisory role with customers or product teams
